coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 5-group, 168-node closure.
validation: The Geometry Nodes output, including all non-manifold edge tubes and tetrahedral diagnostic markers, has exact topology and bounds. The supplied object applies a separate Bevel modifier after Geometry Nodes; that non-GN modifier is excluded from the fair VM comparison and documented with its full-stack evaluated counts.

materialParity.validation: The browser recognizes the authored two-node Background to Material Output contract generically, routes the exact 53,760-index flat.w group through MeshBasicMaterial, and rejects linked Background inputs instead of claiming unsupported procedural parity. A distinct GN-only authored Eevee reference and aligned WebGL capture have silhouette IoU 0.9921. The capture-only scale-relative RectArea rig replaces the incompatible RoomEnvironment plus hemisphere/directional lights: luminance MAE falls from 0.7378 to 0.0644, macro correlation rises from -0.077 to 0.808, and binary light/dark disagreement falls from 99.3% to 0.34%. The filament front and back color branches now reproduce Blender exactly; the remaining visible material residual is the procedural Wave/Bump normal perturbation.
